name: Pathmark Local App Windows
label: Seasonal landscape banners
release_notes: Adds soft AI-generated New Zealand seasonal landscape banners to the hosted experience when using Seasonal or an explicit seasonal theme, with a preview on the Theme page.
notes: Seasonal, Spring, Summer, Autumn and Winter themes can now display a soft AI-generated New Zealand landscape banner.
Banners use The Remarkables for winter, Paihia for summer, Arrowtown for autumn, and the Waikato for spring.
Theme page now previews the seasonal banner treatment and explains that non-seasonal accent themes keep a cleaner card-only look.
Home, Pathmark Planner, Spending Plan and Meal Plan now use a restrained compact banner treatment when a seasonal theme is active.
